scripts.build:external-bins: cargo build --release -p raiopdf-engine-host -p raiopdf-mcp-launcher && node installer/prepare-external-bins.mjs
scripts.test:platforms: node --test installer/platforms.test.mjs installer/payload-manifest.test.mjs installer/tauri-platform-config.test.mjs scripts/sign-macos-app-binaries.test.mjs scripts/macos-word-automation-harness.test.mjs scripts/generate-legal-notices.test.mjs scripts/assert-e2e-webdriver-not-in-release.test.mjs
scripts.prepare:shell-bundle:windows-x64: pnpm --filter @raiopdf/mcp build && node installer/run-payload-assembler.mjs --platform windows-x64 && pnpm build:external-bins
scripts.prepare:shell-bundle:macos-arm64: pnpm --filter @raiopdf/mcp build && node installer/run-payload-assembler.mjs --platform macos-arm64 && pnpm build:external-bins
scripts.build:shell:windows-x64: pnpm prepare:shell-bundle:windows-x64 && pnpm --filter @raiopdf/shell tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.windows-x64.conf.json
scripts.build:shell:e2e:windows-x64: pnpm prepare:shell-bundle:windows-x64 && pnpm --filter @raiopdf/shell tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.windows-x64.conf.json --config src-tauri/tauri.e2e.conf.json --no-bundle --features e2e-webdriver
scripts.build:shell:macos-arm64: pnpm prepare:shell-bundle:macos-arm64 && pnpm --filter @raiopdf/shell tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.macos.conf.json
scripts.build:shell:signed: node scripts/stamp-shell-version.mjs && pnpm prepare:shell-bundle && pnpm --filter @raiopdf/shell tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.windows.signing.conf.json
scripts.test:release-assets: node scripts/generate-latest-json.test.mjs && node scripts/release-assets.test.mjs && node scripts/validate-package-boundary.test.mjs && node scripts/site-release-data.test.mjs
